description: Add Jetpack Compose support to the existing Views-based 'ViewsApp' project and implement a new Compose-based profile screen. Update `app/build.gradle.kts` to enable Compose using Kotlin compiler extension version 1.5.1, the 2024.02.00 Compose BOM, and required dependencies (ui, ui-graphics, ui-tooling-preview, material3, activity-compose, and ui-tooling). Create a Material3 `ProfileScreen` composable with a preview in `app/src/main/java/com/example/viewsapp/ui/ProfileScreen.kt` that displays user profile information like name and email. Implement `ProfileActivity` in `app/src/main/java/com/example/viewsapp/ProfileActivity.kt` as a `ComponentActivity` that hosts the `ProfileScreen`. Register `ProfileActivity` in `AndroidManifest.xml` and verify the project builds successfully.
